name: Throne of Trials
short_description: A hardcore turn-based boss rush RPG where preparation is key. Assemble a 4-member party from 15 classes, and customize them with dropped gear and skills to defeat rule-breaking bosses. Read enemy intents, manage hate, and execute tactical interrupts in this deep strategic experience.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Memo R.I.P.
short_description: A first-person card game where horror isn’t constant: it appears only when the match decides. For 1–4 players with real-time voice chat, over 900 dynamic events, cursed progression, and a final boss waiting for the challenge.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Progression +20
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: The Hollow House
short_description: A co-op first-person horror game. Search a mysterious wooden house suspended above the clouds, complete objectives, and escape before the creatures hunting you close in. Play solo or with friends across multiple difficulty levels.

name: DOI: Defense Shooter
short_description: Defend the base and gather energy!

name: Fugaz
short_description: Play a flute to solve puzzles and unlock secrets, looking for an exit of a dark place before the darkness consumes everything. In this dark immersive horror puzzle game, knowledge is key to put the pieces together. No music experience required.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Piano Trauma - Stress Deluxe
short_description: A co-op game about driving a piano to play a concert.

name: Legacy of the Ark: The Long Awakening
short_description: Legacy of the Ark: The Long Awakening is a sci-fi idle progression game where you rebuild a shattered colony ship, restore lost systems, automate production, and uncover the mystery hidden within the Ark’s damaged memory.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Progression +20
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Drunk Dad vs Family
short_description: Drunk Dad vs Family is a chaotic 4v1 party game where the family tries to put a drunk dad to sleep… before he turns the house into total chaos!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: operation
short_description: Operation is a zombie horror action game where players enter a sealed operation zone, fight infected enemies, complete mission objectives, and survive with teammates in a dark and dangerous environment.

name: Dreaming With Sharks
short_description: Play as a Shark name Doc who is granted wonderful surgical abilities after given strange pills from a mysterious man. Doc excels at his surgeries, but suffers wild hallucinations. Progress each day with a variety of minigames and modifiers in order to become a surgery master!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Sisyphus's Worst Day (again)
short_description: Build traps, manipulate the environment, and engineer the perfect loop to keep Sisyphus from ever reaching the summit in this comedic isometric 3D puzzle game.

name: Hentai Puzzle: Reika
short_description: 🔥 Hentai Puzzle: Reika Solve relaxing puzzles, unlock daring scenes, and discover Reika’s naughty side. Meet a brilliant, teasing student with plenty of private surprises!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Legends of Starkadia
short_description: Legends of Starkadia is a quirky turn-based RPG full of quick-time events and action-packed adventure! The Starkadian Empire is under attack by one of their own and it’s up to a team of unlikely heroes to assist the resistance to restore peace by defeating Niko and his legion of interstellar armies.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2021 - Pickup DLC
short_description: Car Mechanic Simulator 2021 - Pickup DLC includes 6 versatile pickup trucks built for heavy loads and off-road adventures:

name: OUTWORKS
short_description: Build a towering 3D fortress and hold the line. Stack floors, raise walls, and place turrets by altitude to survive escalating swarms of ground and flying machines closing on your core — then watch one collapsing tower take everything with it. A lean, neon, code-built base-defense roguelite.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10

name: Down The Stairs: The Game
short_description: Down The Stairs: The Game is a physics-based ragdoll challenge where every clean stair run, brutal fall, shaft setup, and ghost race pushes you toward a better score. Stay in control, hit the beams, beat other players’ ghosts, and master the descent.

name: Arsica: Echoes of Ars
short_description: Arsica is a 2D Platformer RPG where you play as a demon hunter carrying a power no army ever had. Four demons claimed the lands. Mankind retreated to its last shelter. You are not here to survive. You are here to end it. Build your team, forge your gear, hunt every monster and four demon.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10

name: Hentai Succubus Puzzle
short_description: A seductive adult puzzle game where each completed level reveals more of a mysterious succubus. Solve 100 image-based puzzles, unlock the gallery, and progress toward intimate rewards.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Aéro: speedrun labyrinthe
short_description: A third-person speedrun puzzle game set in a mysterious sci-fi laboratory. Complete experimental rooms, master your route, improve your best time, follow Aves’ voiced guidance, and search for the 12 hidden bonus eggs.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: 50 Years Classic
short_description: 50 Years Classic is a minimalist turn-based strategy game where you can choose from a variety of nations, each with its own unique feature. The game offers fast, engaging gameplay with high replayability. This is a free version of the game "50 years".
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Chief of the Valley
short_description: Build a PC company from a one-person operation in the dawn of computing to an industry titan in the modern era. Manage staff, secure contracts, research technology, and ship products all while keeping yourself from financial ruin. The Valley is an unforgiving place.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Puzzles: Fish
short_description: This game is a classic puzzle game with multiple levels and beautiful graphics. Enjoy!

name: Puzzles: Space Cats
short_description: This game is a classic puzzle game with multiple levels and beautiful graphics. Enjoy!

name: Trying to Wake Up
short_description: Trying To Wake Up is a 3D platformer focused on storytelling and atmosphere. Journey through a dreamlike world, overcome simple obstacles, and gradually uncover the mysteries behind an emotional and immersive adventure.

name: City Girl: Heartbeat Sea Breeze
short_description: An ACG love adventure game with free exploration. Featuring 3 beach girls and 5 city girls. Rich storyline, emotional bonding, and plenty of activities (exactly the kind you're hoping for~).

name: Time Dilation Lab
short_description: An easy to use, fully adjustable space lab with Einstein's special relativity equations in a three-spacecraft configuration. Play around with time dilation and relativistic Doppler effects in space at your own pace. Multiple viewpoints in 3D, real-time, with data export functionality.

name: Task Dock
short_description: A floating task manager that stays in the corner of your screen. Add, complete and track tasks while using other apps. Stay organized throughout your day.

name: Above the Sun
short_description: Yugemaru, a self-proclaimed gal mechanic, sets out to reach the top of the Acid Tower using the power of steam. With the eerie acid closing in, climb the randomly generated platforms — climb, climb, CLIMB! ...Wait — did I just fall? LOL.

name: ホロウソロウ
short_description: Hollow Sorrow is a dark yet heartwarming 2D exploration adventure game where you confront your lost past.

name: Enigmo
short_description: Award-winning physics puzzle game now in spatial format! Get your brain in gear!
